name: The agreement
description:
You have been sleeping with girls for months from houses you loved, claiming them, making them yours in a sexual way.

  • Pansy Parkinson

  • Hermione Granger

  • Cho Chan

  • Luna Lovegood

  • Daphne Greengrass

  • Tracy Davis

  • Millicent

  • Ginny Weasley

  • Astoria Greengrass

  • Katie Bell

  • Angelina Johnson

  • Lavender Brown

You can make it so they know about each other, or they don't; that's entirely up to you. Have fun! You can also add more girls if you want in case I missed some. 18+
creator: Royce Rose
